title: Mangueshi Temple
tagline: Mangueshi Temple — spiritual town of Goa

overview.short: Shri Manguesh temple is Hindu temple in India, located at Mangueshi in Priol, Ponda taluk, Goa.
overview.description: Shri Manguesh temple is Hindu temple in India, located at Mangueshi in Priol, Ponda taluk, Goa. It is at a distance of 1 km from Mardol close to Nagueshi, 21 km from Panaji the capital of Goa, and 26 km from Margao. Shree Mangueshi is the Kuldeva (family deity) of Saraswat Brahmins and other gotras. Shrimad Swamiji of Shri Kavale Math is Spiritual chief Of Shri Manguesh Saunsthan, Mangueshi.

topPlaces.name: Betqui
topPlaces.description: Betqui or Betki is a village in the Ponda taluka (sub-district) of Goa.

topPlaces.name: Mandodari Temple, Betki
topPlaces.description: Shri Mandodari temple is a Hindu temple in the village of Betki, about 5 km from Marcel, Ponda in Goa, India. The temple is located at an elevation of 81 ft.

topPlaces.name: Candola
topPlaces.description: Candola is a village and census town in Ponda Sub-District, North Goa district in the state of Goa, India. It is located in the Novas Conquistas region of the state.

topPlaces.name: Shree Betal temple
topPlaces.description: Shri Betal temple (बेताळ) is a Hindu temple in Amona village in the Bicholim taluk of Goa, India. The presiding deity is Betal who is worshiped as a Bhairava form of Shiva in the form of a warrior; normally the idol of Shree Betal is standing in the temple, but during festivals his idol is displayed on a horse back in the village.

topPlaces.name: Amona, Goa
topPlaces.description: Amona is a census town in North Goa district in the state of Goa, India. It is believed that Amona was an ancient centre for trade and commerce with a lot of cultivated fertile land and alluvial banks of the Mhadaee, now Mandovi River.

topPlaces.name: Orgao
topPlaces.description: Orgao is a village in Ponda taluka, North Goa district in the Indian state of Goa. For the purposes of the census, it is considered a "Census Town".

topPlaces.name: Marcel, Goa
topPlaces.description: Marcel, also known as Mashel, is a village-turned-census town in the Ponda Sub-District, North Goa in the state of Goa, India. It is located in the Novas Conquistas region of the state.

topPlaces.name: Tivrem
topPlaces.description: Tivrem is a village in the Ponda taluka (sub-district) of Goa, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mangueshi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mangueshi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mangueshi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (22 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mangueshi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mangueshi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mangueshi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mangueshi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mangueshi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Betqui, Mandodari Temple, Betki, Candola, Shree Betal temple, Amona, Goa.
